title: This Guy Made 3 Domino's Pizzas in 31 Seconds Flat
script: Three pizzas in 31 seconds? Richard Delcid, a Domino's manager from Manassas, Virginia, just became the fastest pizza maker on Earth. At the 2026 World's Fastest Pizza Maker competition in Las Vegas, Delcid stretched the dough, spread the sauce, and distributed every topping on 3 large pies — a pepperoni, a mushroom, and a cheese — in 31.22 seconds. Judges inspected every pie. All passed. He won $5,000, a trophy, and a championship belt. The man started working at Domino's as a part-time door hanger back in 2012. This was his third time competing, second time reaching the finals, and first time winning. One pizza every 10 seconds. Sauce, stretch, toppings — repeat — while the whole room is watching. So what are you doing that fast today?
